button.primary: bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white hover:bg-[#002FA7] font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-4 px-8 rounded-none transition-colors border border-transparent hover:border-[#002FA7]
button.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A0A0A] border-2 border-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#F4F4F5] font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-4 px-8 rounded-none transition-colors
button.ghost: bg-transparent text-[#52525B] hover:text-[#0A0A0A] hover:bg-[#F4F4F5] font-medium text-sm py-2 px-4 rounded-none transition-colors

card.default: bg-white border-2 border-[#E4E4E7] p-8 rounded-none transition-all hover:border-[#0A0A0A] hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]

input.default: bg-[#FAFAFA] border-2 border-[#E4E4E7] text-[#09090B] placeholder:text-[#A1A1AA] rounded-none px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#002FA7] focus:ring-0 transition-colors

upload_zone.default: border-2 border-dashed border-[#E4E4E7] bg-[#FAFAFA] hover:border-[#002FA7] hover:bg-[#F0F4FF] transition-all flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-16 text-center cursor-pointer min-h-[300px]

badge.high_risk: bg-[#DC2626] text-white px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none
badge.medium_risk: bg-[#EAB308] text-black px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none
badge.low_risk: bg-[#16A34A] text-white px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none

table.header: bg-[#FAFAFA] border-b-2 border-[#0A0A0A] text-[#0A0A0A] font-semibold p-4

images.description: Business people signing a contract at a table.
Miniature houses and notes on a dark table.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Swiss Brutalist styling: use the Cabinet Grotesk font for bold, high-contrast headings and JetBrains Mono for technical data points.
Use solid 2px borders with heavy drop-shadows (e.g., shadow-[8px_8px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]) for interactive cards to mimic high-end technical brutalism.
Implement the Upload Zone as a massive, central component emphasizing drag-and-drop mechanics with a dashed border that reacts dynamically on hover.
The Risk Matrix Table must have extreme data density, 2px solid bottom borders for headers, and clean typography mapping colors (Red/Yellow/Green) strictly to Risk Badges.
Ensure all buttons use the uppercase tracking-widest font-bold style with rounded-none (sharp corners).
For the Processing Status Display, design a clean deterministic progress bar or an analytical step-by-step terminal readout rather than a simple spinning icon.
Make sure every interactive element includes a 'data-testid' attribute for testing.
